passages.excerpt:
By + large "Valis" gives a correct formulation of the entire situation. But I now see VALIS as the point of it all rather than just a solution to a problem ( maybe these two views are the same).

Perhaps the first builder(s) (creator) botched the job + created something irreal + irrational, itself being irrational + into which a higher wiser -+ rational - [deity] has introduced VALIS, whose job it is is to convert the irreal to real, the irrational to the rational. this could be the dialectic I saw.

973-1531 Russ Galen's Scott Meredith,SMLA Sale to Berkley 845 Third Ave Books The Best New York of my Career N.Y. 10022 Please Congratulate him.

He has [eni] Philip K. Dick

"How could I ask myself, 'What possibly could I know what (i.e. that) I'm not supposed to know?' When (1) I know about the occlusion; and C,2) of Valis' presence here? I should ponder the fact that I came within inches of death twice after knowing about

And there the notes end, because at that moment the phonecall from Russ came where I learned that Bantam doesn't feel it can publish VALIS. What a place for the notes to endl What was I going to say, had I not been interrupted? "After knowing about —" Well, I guess I already said. (I) We are all occluded in this ecosphere. And (II) There is a vast life from here, that has invaded this world and is camouflaged, and it has grown vine-like into our information media; it is an information life form...and the presumption is, it occludes us. The secret of how to de-occlude us (a medical technique) was stolen and smuggled here; I, for one, was de-occluded, both perceptually and cogni¬ tively; I was no longer blind and I could think clearly.
